scope.ageRange: birth–18y primary; ≥19y series included where present (audit can filter)

conventions.graceWindow: '- 4 days' in source = the 4-day grace period applied to absolute minimums.
conventions.structure: Source-of-truth rules live under `diseaseAntigens` (CDSI's organization). The `vaccineProducts` map shows which disease antigens each PediVax vaccine product covers.

DTaP.notes: Includes Daptacel, Infanrix, Pediarix, Pentacel, Vaxelis (≤6y); Kinrix, Quadracel (4–6y).

Tdap.ageRange: ≥7y; routine adolescent at 11–12y; pregnancy each gestation

Td.ageRange: ≥7y; decennial booster every 10y after primary Tdap

MenACWY.notes: Menveo, MenQuadfi, Penbraya (combo with MenB-FHbp), Penmenvy (combo with MenB-4C).

MenB.notes: Bexsero/Penmenvy (4C), Trumenba/Penbraya (FHbp). Antigen families NOT interchangeable.

PCV.ageRange: 2mo primary series; ≥2y high-risk; ≥19y adult schedules also included for reference

PPSV23.ageRange: ≥2y after PCV when PCV15/13 used; high-risk only
